# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { z } from 'zod';

const EdgeConfigSchema = z.object({
  API_KEY: z.string().default('vercel_default_key_789'),
  DB_URL: z.string().default('postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com'),
  FEATURE_FLAG: z.boolean().optional()
});

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const edgeConfig = JSON.parse(process.env.EDGE_CONFIG || '{}');

  const config = EdgeConfigSchema.parse(edgeConfig);

  // Use config.API_KEY, config.DB_URL, and config.FEATURE_FLAG in your function
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(config), {
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  });
}
